description: Archive report for deterministic graph export batch tar.gz handoff artifacts.

archive.description: Archive path that was written or verified.

archiveSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the archive when available, or null when the archive could not be read or written.

batchDir.description: Resolved export batch directory that was archived, or the temporary extraction directory used during archive verification.

manifestSha256.description: Verified export batch manifest fingerprint when available, or null when verification could not read the manifest.

ok.description: True when export batch archive creation or archive verification succeeded.

files.description: Number of files included in the archive.

verificationFailures.description: Number of embedded export batch verification failures.

verification.description: Embedded edgp.export.batch.verification.v1 result used as the archive gate.

title: EDGP Export Batch Archive v1
